page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.3xlarge is a KVM-hypervised virtual machine configured with 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 12 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture operates with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 72.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 6.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type features 1919 GB of bundled local SSD storage, making it suitable for applications requiring high-speed local data access. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer across cloud environments. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration.

The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores, a 1:6 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and substantial local SSD storage positions this instance for workloads requiring consistent compute performance and local storage capacity. It is suitable for database hosting, local data caching, and general-purpose applications that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and high network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5ge.3xlarge is a KVM-hypervised server featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 72.0 GB of system memory, yielding 6.0 GB of RAM per core, and is built with a single thread per core design. Storage is provided via a bundled 1919 GB local SSD, and the instance supports a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps. With no integrated GPU, this instance is designed for workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation and significant local storage capacity. It is well-suited for database hosting, data caching, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
